$comment: Copy to router.config.json (or set ROUTER_CONFIG). Point each harness provider at http://localhost:4141/p/<name>. Presets fill baseUrl/dialect/auth/path defaults; pricing is automatic (feed for known gateways, catalog API rates otherwise, `pricing` for private models).

providers.name: copilot
providers.$comment: Preset covers endpoint/paths/cross-vendor. Served models come from the live feed; billed per token in AI credits at ~API rates (Copilot dropped flat-rate billing in June 2026).

providers.name: mygateway
providers.$comment: Known models assume catalog API pricing automatically; `pricing` registers + prices the private model; `adapter` reshapes deviant JSON.
